By the time the regression sweep executes, the cluster has been through four rolling image upgrades (stages 04–07), a major version finalization (stage 07), zone-config changes (stage 10), and a decommission/scale-down from 5→3 nodes (stage 12), leaving the cluster in an active data-rebalancing state. The pod readiness timeout reflects cluster load from those later operations, not any action that logically invalidated the cluster setting (256MiB) that stage 09 was responsible for setting. No later stage was designed to break crdb-cluster-0's restartability; this is a stale-timeout false positive caused by the cluster being under heavier rebalancing pressure than when the oracle first ran.
